pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 21; keeping 17 may result in incorrect bytecode version or missing language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade ModelMapper dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older ModelMapper versions may encounter runtime errors or compilation issues with Java 21 module system or reflection changes.

src/main/java/co/edu/unicauca/distribuid.general_idea: Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
Remove explicit @Autowired annotation from constructor injection to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
Remove redundant @Autowired annotation from constructor injection.
